\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
library(ggplot2)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

nres <- ussteamco.mod.3$residuals / sd(ussteamco.mod.3$residuals)
model3 <- as.data.frame(nres)

# Function to create a histogram with a given number of bins
create_hist <- function(bins) {
  ggplot(model3, aes(nres)) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)),
      breaks = seq(min(nres), max(nres), length.out = bins + 1),
      fill = "#00338D", color = "black"
    ) +
    stat_function(
      fun = dnorm,
      args = list(
        mean = mean(model3$nres),
        sd = sd(model3$nres)
      ),
      color = "red", size = 1
    ) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Histogram with", bins, "bins"),
      x = "Standardized Residuals", y = "Density"
    ) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Create the four histograms
hist_6 <- create_hist(6)
hist_7 <- create_hist(7)
hist_8 <- create_hist(8)
hist_9 <- create_hist(9)

# Arrange in a 2x2 grid using grid
grid.arrange(hist_6, hist_7, hist_8, hist_9, ncol = 2)
\end{Verbatim}
\endgroup
\par\addvspace{\topsep}
